title: Cinematic Hardware Microsite
description: Create cinematic microsite visuals for hardware launches, balancing immersive hero storytelling with readable spec sections and conversion modules.

en.title: Cinematic Hardware Microsite
en.description: Create cinematic microsite visuals for hardware launches, balancing immersive hero storytelling with readable spec sections and conversion modules.

zh-CN.title: 硬件新品微站视觉
zh-CN.description: 为硬件新品发布做更有电影感的 microsite 静帧，既有情绪 hero，也有规格区、场景区和转化区。
